description: Employee Audrey Peterson has requested to move to a part-time role. Log in to Odoo (admin/admin) and update her employment record to reflect this change by setting her Work Schedule to 'Part Time 20 Hours'. Additionally, log an internal note on her profile with the exact text: "Transitioned to part-time schedule effective immediately."

metadata.full_note_text: Transitioned to part-time schedule effective immediately.
